textByHashes.db3c0734f3f6874d02a9b4b4c1a16388b2bbde0c: Only one piece of silver? I need more!
textByHashes.6a5116f63c31c06a28d06eddde7274a26df18572: These clothes are awful, get me some others!
textByHashes.ea900021edf17313c24fd8fb154fdfe3cef8fd81: My chisel's gone blunt, buy me one!
textByHashes.072879426c5c6ef1b6ac7015fffe50de4e80c450: This chisel's rubbish, get me another!
textByHashes.62c09b1d2989c5609e4955242f10fb23aec09933: What? Speak up, I can't hear you!
textByHashes.28f08a4ae097c6cafae2bb79c0b92b151eee2977: Do I have any pickaxes? Do I? Of course I do, this is a pickaxe shop, isn't it!
textByHashes.5466a4e2753faf951e7feb7e97c0f53ad84b48b0: I don't have any lousy quests... I've got someone who's helping me already!
textByHashes.a497e237910a15417708c75d82d2b7ca8aa34545: Well, I say helping... he takes his merry time to do his chores, my son does.
textByHashes.734fcf8e8ebc22eb8651ca58ed7cdb10049cf642: Pfft, I doubt it... maybe when my son fouls up again, but not now.
textByHashes.d1b4223bfcda070c5aec605a352dd305117f2448: My no good son must be down the pub again, drinking away all our money instead of getting one simple item from the market for me.
textByHashes.295e118fdb09dbd391200cc04e8381c53e69b53b: Now, I have another errand. Perhaps you will be more useful?
textByHashes.1218f6bef38bca1345380c967a3965fd1d0049d5: I'm in need of some raw supplies. Get me item and be quick about it! I need them within the next minutes!
textByHashes.628784791fcb78428ac820493f05b02fe4e1176f: You're just as bad as my son, or worse!
textByHashes.dcee53b98cc785d303280f7cc63eaf4821a19648: Where're my item? My son could've gotten them faster!
textByHashes.a8fc145591b4e48943f455b6d47f85f280ed1982: Why you useless little human! I should thrown you in the Kelda! With a lump of granite attached to your feet!
textByHashes.b34aab23922b0ffb7805759c556afc60bf9f04ba: Try a little harder! I don't have all day you know!
textByHashes.3ef7d4801773d8ed1038ebfc7f9a271998dfdedf: I need a couple of iron pickaxes, I'm always short on the darned things. But hurry up! I will need them before 15 minutes are up.
textByHashes.ed88c0ffabd251b3c2b0e30bf74f89b44ec3c43c: I need a couple of iron pickaxes, I'm always short on the darned things. But hurry up! I will need them before 20 minutes are up.
textByHashes.7c631f2a9ebf4ce8471e622e76c81ad8cef49732: I need a couple of iron pickaxes, I'm always short on the darned things. But hurry up! I will need them before 25 minutes are up.
textByHashes.76e767fc23f71b507a8fb3430bc0ea7dc2debd16: You're as bad as my soon! Clear off before I beat you with this stick!
textByHashes.959da729b8dd6b3a62245ec11e5890a594eb7dac: Give 'em to me quick before I change my mind about rewarding you!
textByHashes.03b510c9be8e6aefafd306137ac0add5d7d20215: Do you want me to pay you for these or can I get away with teaching you how to mine properly?
textByHashes.6b91ead5f0f435645744e7da7c38465954c6bd4c: Do you want me to pay you in gold or would you prefer me to teach you a bit about how you can mine more efficiently?
textByHashes.f91c9fdf173e3389a2616ff163cd9707ec5cfa82: Do you want me to pay you in gold or would you like me to show you some smithing tricks?
